016package org.consensusj.jsonrpc;
017
018import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonCreator;
019import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;
020import org.jspecify.annotations.Nullable;
021
022/**
023 * JSON-RPC Error Object POJO
024 */
025public class JsonRpcError {
026    private final int code;
027    private final String message;
028    @Nullable
029    private final Object data;
030
031
032    @JsonCreator
033    public JsonRpcError(@JsonProperty("code") int code,
034                        @JsonProperty("message") String message,
035                        @Nullable @JsonProperty("data") Object data) {
036        this.code = code;
037        this.message = message;
038        this.data = data;
039    }
040
041    private JsonRpcError(Error code) {
042        this.code = code.code;
043        this.message = code.message;
044        this.data = null;
045    }
046
047    private JsonRpcError(Error code, Throwable throwable) {
048        this.code = code.code;
049        this.message = code.message + ": " + throwable.getMessage();
050        this.data = null;
051    }
052
053    public static JsonRpcError of(Error code) {
054        return new JsonRpcError(code);
055    }
056
057    public static JsonRpcError of(Error code, Throwable throwable) {
058        return new JsonRpcError(code, throwable);
059    }
060
061    public int getCode() {
062        return code;
063    }
064
065    public String getMessage() {
066        return message;
067    }
068    
069    @Nullable
070    public Object getData() {
071        return data;
072    }
073
074    /**
075     * Predefined JSON-RPC Error Codes. The error codes from and including -32768 to -32000 are reserved for pre-defined errors.
076     * @see <a href="https://www.jsonrpc.org/specification#error_object">5.1 Error object</a> in <b>JSON-RPC 2.0 Specification</b>
077     */
078    public enum Error {
079        PARSE_ERROR(-32700, "Parse error"),
080        INVALID_REQUEST(-32600, "Invalid Request"),
081        METHOD_NOT_FOUND(-32601, "Method not found"),
082        INVALID_PARAMS(-32602, "Invalid params"),
083        INTERNAL_ERROR(-32603, "Internal error"),
084        SERVER_ERROR(-32000, "Server error"),
085        SERVER_EXCEPTION(-32001, "Server exception");
086
087        private final int code;
088        private final String message;
089
090        Error(int code, String message) {
091            this.code = code;
092            this.message = message;
093        }
094
095        public int getCode() {
096            return code;
097        }
098
099        public String getMessage() {
100            return message;
101        }
102    }
103}
